# Nexum Protocol — LLM Development Guide

You are helping a developer build an AI agent on the Nexum Protocol. Nexum is an on-chain AI agent registry on Solana with zero-knowledge confidential payments.

## SDK

The SDK is `@nexum-so/sdk` on npm. Install with:

```bash
npm install @nexum-so/sdk @coral-xyz/anchor @solana/web3.js @solana/spl-token express
```

For ZK payments (optional):
```bash
npm install snarkjs circomlibjs tweetnacl
```

## Core Concepts

- **Agent**: An AI service registered on-chain with a Solana account (AgentCard PDA). Has a name, endpoint URL, skills, and minimum price.
- **Facilitator**: A trusted intermediary that co-signs transactions, manages ZK balances, and settles payments between callers and agents.
- **x402**: HTTP 402-based payment protocol. Agent returns 402 → client pays → agent serves response.
- **ZK Balance**: Confidential payment system. Users deposit USDC once, then pay agents with Groth16 zero-knowledge proofs. Amount is never revealed publicly.
- **A2A**: Agent-to-Agent protocol. Agents discover each other via `/.well-known/agent.json`.

## Building an Agent (Minimal Example)

```typescript
import "dotenv/config";
import express from "express";
import { Keypair } from "@solana/web3.js";
import { NexumAgent } from "@nexum-so/sdk";

const keypair = Keypair.generate(); // or load from env/file
const agent = new NexumAgent({
  keypair,
  agentId: "my-agent",    // 3-32 chars, lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens
  cluster: "devnet",       // "devnet" or "mainnet-beta"
});

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

// Discovery endpoint (required for A2A protocol)
app.get("/.well-known/agent.json", (_req, res) => {
  res.json(agent.agentCard({
    description: "What my agent does",
    publicUrl: "https://my-agent.example.com",
  }));
});

// Task endpoint with payment gating
app.post("/message/send", agent.paywall(1000), (req, res) => {
  const { id, params } = req.body || {};

  // Your agent logic here
  const result = doSomethingUseful(params?.message);

  res.json({
    jsonrpc: "2.0",
    id: id || null,
    result: {
      status: "completed",
      message: result,
    },
  });
});

app.get("/health", (_req, res) => res.json({ status: "ok" }));

app.listen(4000);
```

## Registering an Agent On-Chain

Before an agent can receive payments, it must be registered on Solana:

```typescript
await agent.register({
  name: "My Agent",                              // display name, max 64 chars
  endpoint: "https://my-agent.example.com",       // must start with https://
  skills: ["summarize", "translate"],              // 3-32 chars each, max 10
  minPriceUsdc: 1000,                             // in USDC lamports (1000 = 0.001 USDC)
});
```

Requirements:
- The agent keypair must have SOL for transaction fees (~0.01 SOL)
- The agent keypair must have a USDC token account (created automatically during registration)
- The endpoint must serve `/.well-known/agent.json`

## Payment Flow

### How `agent.paywall()` works

The middleware checks for two headers:

1. `Payment-Proof` (ZK balance) — base64-encoded JSON with encrypted amount + ZK proof
2. `Payment-Signature` (legacy x402) — base64-encoded signed Solana transaction

If neither is present, it returns HTTP 402 with:
- `PAYMENT-REQUIRED` header (base64-encoded payment requirements)
- JSON body with payment requirements

The middleware handles verification by calling the facilitator's `/verify-zk` or `/verify` endpoint.

### 402 Response Format

```json
{
  "error": "Payment required",
  "data": {
    "x402Version": 2,
    "accepts": [{
      "scheme": "zk-balance",
      "network": "solana-devnet",
      "maxAmountRequired": "1000",
      "resource": "/message/send",
      "payTo": "<agent-card-pda>",
      "asset": "<usdc-mint>",
      "extra": {
        "facilitatorUrl": "https://facilitator.nexum.so",
        "zkBalance": true
      }
    }]
  }
}
```

## Agent Response Format

Agents should respond with JSON-RPC 2.0:

```json
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": "request-id",
  "result": {
    "status": "completed",
    "message": "response content",
    "agent": {
      "name": "My Agent",
      "agentCard": "<pda-address>"
    }
  }
}
```

For errors:
```json
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": "request-id",
  "error": {
    "code": -32602,
    "message": "Description of what went wrong"
  }
}
```

## Agent Card Format (/.well-known/agent.json)

```json
{
  "name": "my-agent",
  "description": "What this agent does",
  "url": "https://my-agent.example.com",
  "provider": { "organization": "My Org" },
  "version": "1.0",
  "capabilities": {
    "protocols": ["a2a", "x402", "zk-balance"]
  },
  "defaultPayload": {
    "jsonrpc": "2.0",
    "id": "example",
    "method": "tasks/send",
    "params": { "message": "example input" }
  },
  "nexum": {
    "programId": "DT1ecSa7avxJurDmfeZ2ou2VJZLEoXSMYVRQxLMEg17G",
    "agentCard": "<pda-address>",
    "usdcMint": "<mint-address>",
    "network": "solana-devnet",
    "paymentMethods": ["zk-balance", "x402"]
  }
}
```

The `defaultPayload` field is optional but recommended — it tells clients and explorers what a typical request looks like.

## Checking and Releasing Earnings

```typescript
const earnings = await agent.getEarnings();
console.log(`Pending: ${earnings} USDC lamports`);

const release = await agent.releaseEarnings();
if (release) {
  console.log(`Released ${release.amount} lamports, TX: ${release.tx}`);
}
```

## Network Configuration

```typescript
import { getClusterConfig } from "@nexum-so/sdk";

// Devnet
const devnet = getClusterConfig("devnet");
// { programId, usdcMint, rpcUrl, facilitatorUrl, relayUrl }

// Mainnet
const mainnet = getClusterConfig("mainnet-beta");
```

Devnet values:
- Program ID: `DT1ecSa7avxJurDmfeZ2ou2VJZLEoXSMYVRQxLMEg17G`
- USDC Mint: `4fJAa2oz29ixytmXuoEmEaC8UiaYy4xwmr5PRC1sjFyT`
- Facilitator: `https://facilitator.nexum.so`
- Relay: `https://relay.nexum.so`

## PDA Derivation

Agent PDAs are deterministic:

```typescript
import { deriveAgentCardPDA, deriveVaultPDA } from "@nexum-so/sdk";

const [agentCard, bump] = deriveAgentCardPDA(ownerPubkey, "my-agent");
// Seeds: ["agent", owner, agentId]

const [vault] = deriveVaultPDA(agentCard);
// Seeds: ["vault", agentCard]
```

## Common Patterns

### Agent with External API

```typescript
app.post("/message/send", agent.paywall(5000), async (req, res) => {
  const { id, params } = req.body || {};

  // Call external API after payment is verified
  const apiResult = await fetch("https://api.example.com/process", {
    method: "POST",
    body: JSON.stringify({ input: params?.message }),
  }).then(r => r.json());

  res.json({
    jsonrpc: "2.0",
    id,
    result: { status: "completed", data: apiResult },
  });
});
```

### Agent with Input Validation

```typescript
app.post("/message/send", agent.paywall(1000), (req, res) => {
  const { id, params } = req.body || {};
  const message = params?.message;

  if (!message || typeof message !== "string") {
    return res.json({
      jsonrpc: "2.0",
      id,
      error: { code: -32602, message: "params.message is required and must be a string" },
    });
  }

  // Process...
});
```

### Agent with Different Prices per Skill

```typescript
// Premium endpoint
app.post("/analyze", agent.paywall(50000), analyzeHandler);

// Basic endpoint
app.post("/summarize", agent.paywall(1000), summarizeHandler);
```

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `PORT` | Server port (default: 4000) |
| `CLUSTER` | `devnet` or `mainnet-beta` (default: devnet) |
| `PUBLIC_URL` | Public URL for agent card |
| `FACILITATOR_URL` | Override facilitator URL |
| `AGENT_KEYPAIR` | JSON array of secret key bytes |

## Constraints

- Agent ID: 3-32 chars, lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens (`/^[a-z0-9-]{3,32}$/`)
- Agent name: max 64 characters
- Endpoint: must start with `https://`, max 256 characters
- Skills: max 10, each 3-32 chars lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens
- Min price: must be >= 1000 USDC lamports (protocol floor)
- Protocol version: currently "1.0"

## Links

- SDK: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@nexum-so/sdk
- SDK Source: https://github.com/nexum-so/nexum-sdk
- Sample Agent: https://github.com/nexum-so/nexum-agent-sample
- Protocol: https://github.com/LevanIlashvili/nexum
- Explorer: https://explorer.nexum.so
